title: FileSettings
description: FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

FileName.description: The name of the file, including the file extension

Directory.description: The folder directory on your computer where the file is to be located. Directory should not include the name of the file.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
